blended.narrative: Bolton Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 47°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
